option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from django.contrib.auth import views as auth_views from django.urls import path
from . import views
urlpatterns = [ path('', views.home, name='home'), path('register/', views.register, name='register'), path('login/', auth_views.LoginView.as_view(template_name='login.html'), name='login'), path('logout/', auth_views.LogoutView.as_view(), name='logout'), path('dashboard/', views.dashboard, name='dashboard'), path('profile/', views.manage_profile, name='manage_profile'), path('grades/new/', views.add_grade, name='add_grade'), path('goals/new/', views.add_goal, name='add_goal'), path('notifications/', views.notifications_view, name='notifications'), path('notifications/<int:pk>/read/', views.mark_notification_read, name='mark_notification_read'), ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from django.contrib.auth import views as auth_views from django.urls import path
from . import views
urlpatterns = [ path('', views.home, name='home'), path('register/', views.register, name='register'), path('login/', auth_views.LoginView.as_view(template_name='login.html'), name='login'), path('logout/', auth_views.LogoutView.as_view(), name='logout'), path('dashboard/', views.dashboard, name='dashboard'), path('profile/', views.manage_profile, name='manage_profile'), path('grades/new/', views.add_grade, name='add_grade'), path('goals/new/', views.add_goal, name='add_goal'), path('notifications/', views.notifications_view, name='notifications'), path('notifications/<int:pk>/read/', views.mark_notification_read, name='mark_notification_read'), path('data/', views.data_management, name='data_management'), path('subjects/<int:pk>/edit/', views.edit_subject, name='edit_subject'), path('subjects/<int:pk>/delete/', views.delete_subject, name='delete_subject'), ]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Data Management | StudyTrack{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Data Management

View, edit, and manage your subjects and grades

{% for message in messages %}
{{ message }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if subject_data %}
{% for item in subject_data %} {% endfor %}
Subject Average Target Grades Actions
{{ item.subject.name }} {% if item.average %} {{ item.average }} {% else %} - {% endif %} {% if item.target_grade %} {{ item.target_grade }} {% else %} - {% endif %} {{ item.grades_count }} Edit Delete

Total Subjects: {{ total_subjects }}

{% else %}
No subjects yet. Start by adding a subject and goal.
{% endif %}

{% endblock %}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Delete Subject | StudyTrack{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Delete Subject

Warning! This action cannot be undone.

You are about to delete the subject "{{ subject.name }}" and all associated data including:

  • {{ subject.grades.all|length }} grade(s)
  • {{ subject.goals.all|length }} goal(s)
{% csrf_token %}
Cancel
{% endblock %}
